name: Workshop B02 · ALDC + Skills Playground
brief: Playground for ALDC + Agent Skills · Workshop V-Valley 2026 · Bloque 02
description: Per-Tenant Extension used as hands-on playground during Bloque 02 of the Workshop ALDC V-Valley 2026. The .github/ folder starts clean (just copilot-instructions and skill-diagnostics) so you can watch ALDC populate it live during the demo.
